products.name: Redragon K552 Kumara TKL
products.description: Compact tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with Outemu Blue switches. Durable metal plate construction, red LED backlight, anti-ghosting for all keys. Ideal for gaming and office use.

products.name: Logitech G102 Lightsync
products.description: 8000 DPI adjustable optical sensor, 6 programmable buttons with onboard memory. 16.8M color RGB LIGHTSYNC. Ambidextrous design, ultra-light 85g. Smooth 1ms polling rate.

products.name: Fantech HG20 RGB Headset
products.description: 7.1 virtual surround sound gaming headset. Omnidirectional noise-canceling microphone. Soft memory foam ear cushions. Dual mode USB + 3.5mm. RGB LED lighting.

products.name: Havit HV-KB395L Low Profile
products.description: Ultra-slim low-profile mechanical switches with 2mm actuation. Full-size 104-key layout. Per-key RGB backlight with 20 lighting effects. Quiet and comfortable for extended typing.

products.name: A4Tech Bloody A70 Neon
products.description: Blazing Light Strike optical switch — 0.2ms response. 4000 DPI. 7 programmable buttons. Ergonomic right-hand design with non-slip rubber grip. Braided cable.

products.name: Rapoo VH510 7.1 Headset
products.description: Professional 7.1 virtual surround sound. Retractable noise-canceling microphone. Plush protein leather ear cushions for all-day comfort. USB powered with inline volume control.

products.name: SteelSeries QcK Plus Mousepad
products.description: 450x400mm premium micro-woven cloth surface for consistent low-friction glide. Non-slip rubber base stays in place. Anti-fray stitched edges. Compatible with all mouse sensors.

products.name: Philips 24E1N1300A Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch Full HD IPS panel with 100Hz refresh rate and 4ms response time. HDMI + VGA connectivity. Eye comfort certified — flicker-free and low blue mode. Ultra-slim 7mm bezel.

products.name: Anker 7-Port USB 3.0 Hub
products.description: 7 SuperSpeed USB 3.0 ports supporting 5Gbps data transfer. Individual LED power indicators. Compact aluminum housing. Bus-powered — no external adapter needed. Win/Mac/Linux compatible.

products.name: Redragon M711 Cobra RGB
products.description: 10000 DPI adjustable optical sensor with 7 weight tuning. 7 programmable buttons. 16.8M RGB lighting with 7 zones. Durable braided cable. 7 programmable macros per profile.

products.name: Aukey KM-G9 Full-Size RGB
products.description: Full-size 104-key mechanical keyboard with Blue switches. Floating keycap design with per-key RGB. Anti-ghosting N-key rollover. Detachable palm rest included. USB passthrough port.

products.name: Havit RGB XL Desk Mousepad
products.description: Extended 900x400mm desk-sized gaming surface. USB-powered RGB LED edge lighting with 14 lighting modes. Micro-woven cloth surface for precision. Non-slip natural rubber base.

products.name: TP-Link UE300 USB Ethernet
products.description: USB 3.0 to Gigabit Ethernet adapter supporting up to 1000Mbps. Plug-and-play on Windows, Mac and Linux. Foldable compact design for travel. No drivers needed for most systems.

products.name: Logitech G435 Wireless Headset
products.description: Lightweight wireless headset (165g) with Bluetooth 5.1 and LIGHTSPEED 2.4GHz. 18-hour battery. Built-in dual beamforming microphones. Eco-friendly recycled plastic build.

products.name: Baseus 100W Charging Station
products.description: 6-in-1 desktop charging hub. 2x USB-C 100W Power Delivery + 4x USB-A fast charge. Intelligent surge protection. LED power indicator. Compact tower design.
